zh.lifeSummary: 當John Farrington於1355年出生在英國藍卡爾沃爾登 霍爾時，他的父親William de Farrington29歲，母親Dorothy de Standish21歲。他於1379年與Alice Houghton在英國藍卡爾沃爾登 霍爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1410年11月6日在英國藍卡爾法利頓享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Farrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Farrington in Lancashire, but perhaps occasionally from Farrington Gurney in Somerset. Both are named from Old English fearn ‘fern’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The surname also probably reached America via Ireland, where it is recorded as early as the 14th century.

variants.name: Fearrington
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of   Farrington  .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Farrington was born in 1355, in Worden Hall, Lancashire, England, his father, William de Farrington, was 29 and his mother, Dorothy de Standish, was 21. He married Alice Houghton in 1379, in Worden Hall, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died on 6 November 1410, in Farington, Lancashire, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Farrington est né en 1355, à Worden Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William de Farrington, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Dorothy de Standish, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Alice Houghton en 1379, à Worden Hall, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1410, à Farington, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Farringtonが1355年にイギリスランカシュアイアウオルデン ハルで生まれた時，父William de Farringtonは29歳，母Dorothy de Standishは21歳であった。1379年にイギリスランカシュアイアウオルデン ハルでAlice Houghtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1410年11月6日にイギリスランカシュアイアファリントンで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Farrington(이)가 1355년 영국 랭카실르 워든 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Farrington(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy de Standish(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1379년 영국 랭카실르 워든 홀에서 Alice Houghton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1410년 11월 6일 영국 랭카실르 패링턴에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Farrington родился в 1355 г. в местности ворден холл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Farrington было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy de Standish, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Houghton в 1379 г. в местности ворден холл, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер 6 ноября 1410 г. в местности фарингтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Farrington nació en 1355, en Worden Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Farrington, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Dorothy de Standish, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Alice Houghton en 1379, en Worden Hall, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1410, en Farington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
